testcase.name: test_main_download_video_with_quality

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected '_get_available_qualities' to have been called once. Called 0 times.

testcase.failure:
def test_main_download_video_with_quality(): runner = CliRunner() with patch( "apyrat.apyrat.Downloader._get_available_qualities", return_value=["480", "720", "1080"], ) as mock_qualities: result = runner.invoke( main, [ "https://www.aparat.com/v/qur3I", "-q", "720", ], ) assert result.exit_code == 0 > mock_qualities.assert_called_once()
tests/cli_test.py:23: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <MagicMock name='_get_available_qualities' id='4445763440'>
def assert_called_once(self): """assert that the mock was called only once. """ if not self.call_count == 1: msg = ("Expected '%s' to have been called once. Called %s times.%s" % (self._mock_name or 'mock', self.call_count, self._calls_repr())) > raise AssertionError(msg) E AssertionError: Expected '_get_available_qualities' to have been called once. Called 0 times.
/opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/unittest/mock.py:964: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_get_quality_available
testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_get_quality_available(): > downloader = Downloader("https://www.aparat.com/v/qur3I") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: __init__() should return None, not 'coroutine'
tests/cli_test.py:38: TypeError

testcase.name: test_get_quality_not_available
testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_get_quality_not_available(): > downloader = Downloader("https://www.aparat.com/v/qur3I") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: __init__() should return None, not 'coroutine'
tests/cli_test.py:46: TypeError

testcase.name: test_get_available_videos_single_video
test_default_quality
testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_default_quality(): > downloader = Downloader("https://www.aparat.com/v/qur3I", "outputfile") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: __init__() should return None, not 'coroutine'
tests/test_apyrat.py:28: TypeError

testcase.name: test_download_when_file_exists
